parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-001', max_tokens: 8192, temperature: 0, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $('Initialize Job').first().json.visionPrompt }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.imageSource } }] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'google/gemini-2.5-flash-image', modalities: ['text', 'image'], image_config: { aspect_ratio: '1:1' }, max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'A single centered illustration of ' + $json.word + ' (' + $json.description + ') on a clean white background.
